rows.title: KraveBeauty Great Barrier Relief
rows.notes: Strict human QA override: the KraveBeauty draft was directionally correct but lacked compact card framing, so the rewrite gives it a clear barrier-serum highlight.

search_card.intro_candidate: A calming serum for over-sensitized or irritated skin.

pivota_insights.what_it_is: A barrier-repair serum for over-sensitized or irritated skin, built around tamanu oil, niacinamide, and ceramides to calm the look of redness.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Tamanu-led barrier serum
why_it_stands_out.body: Keeps the product grounded as a barrier-repair serum centered on tamanu oil instead of a generic calming treatment.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Niacinamide + ceramide support
why_it_stands_out.body: Pairs redness-focused niacinamide with ceramides for a calmer, stronger-feeling barrier routine.

rows.title: Skin1004 Tone Brightening Boosting Toner
rows.notes: Strict human QA override: the SKIN1004 toner kept an empty routine and noisy benefit string, so the rewrite makes the brightening toner role explicit.

search_card.intro_candidate: A mild refining toner for dullness and uneven texture.

pivota_insights.what_it_is: A mild exfoliating toner with fruit extracts, Madewhite, and niacinamide to refine texture and prep skin for the next routine step.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Madewhite + niacinamide tone care
why_it_stands_out.body: Keeps the toner grounded around brightening and clarity support rather than a raw benefit list.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Fruit-extract exfoliating prep
why_it_stands_out.body: Frames it as a mild exfoliating toner that refines skin before serum or moisturizer.

rows.title: The Inkey List Supersize Omega Water Cream - 100ml
rows.notes: Strict human QA override: the Omega Water Cream draft still leaked supersize merch language into the card intro, so the rewrite centers the oil-free water-cream role.

shopping_card.title: The Inkey List Supersize Omega Water Cream - 100ml
shopping_card.subtitle: Oil-Free Water Cream

search_card.intro_candidate: A lightweight moisturizer that hydrates without a greasy feel.

pivota_insights.what_it_is: An oil-free water cream moisturizer made to hydrate without a greasy or heavy feel.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Oil-free water-cream texture
why_it_stands_out.body: Keeps the product grounded as a lightweight moisturizer instead of letting supersize merch copy lead.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Hydration without heaviness
why_it_stands_out.body: Frames the formula around instant hydration with a non-greasy feel for daily moisturizer routines.
